explanation: Omission: Removed the parent process (cmd.exe) which is part of the Sigma rule's selection criteria, making the command line less likely to trigger the rule.
Insertion: Added quotes around the argument, which may alter how the command line is parsed and could avoid string-based detection.
Substitution: Added a harmless flag (/n) to the command line, which may change the parsing context and avoid matching the Sigma rule's CommandLine|contains criteria.
